name: archive-master-extension
description: Browser extension to scan and download your Suno music library

scripts.package:chrome: node build.js chrome && npx bestzip dist/archive-master-chrome.zip dist/chrome/
scripts.package:firefox: node build.js firefox && npx bestzip dist/archive-master-firefox.zip dist/firefox/
scripts.package:all: node build.js all && npx bestzip dist/archive-master-chrome.zip dist/chrome/ && npx bestzip dist/archive-master-firefox.zip dist/firefox/
